new_value: {"notes":"Policy defined: Admission authority is the lichend operator via config or admin interface. Durable format uses existing RedundantValue/DAO_ADMISSION_KEYS scoped to (root_addr, instance_id, dodag_id) storing admitted 32B pubkeys. Provisioning: explicit operator list (no auto-TOFU admit for DAO); call admit_dao_origin after pinning. Revocation: remove from persistent set (requires retirement API extension). Restart: open() restores admitted set or fails-closed. Fail-closed on corrupt/persistence error prevents RPL root activation. Acceptance vectors: extend dao_origin_signature.json with admission cases. See spec/06-security.md for trust model alignment."}

new_value: Policy defined in notes and implemented in lichen-rpl::routing::DaoAdmissionState and lichen-node::rpl_stack::Router with RedundantValue persistence, admit_dao_origin, fail-closed on corrupt state, explicit provisioning only (no auto-TOFU for production RPL root). Tests in secure_rpl_public pass. Matches acceptance criteria. Commit ebb59942f
